domain_focus: EventStoryLine-style event relation extraction. Use the normalized document, sentence IDs, event mentions and OWL-Time ontology as constraints. The task is constrained event-event relation prediction.
abstraction_level: event mention or event cluster level. Preserve sentence IDs and event IDs. Relations connect events, not generic entities.
population_policy: Predict only event-event relations supported by textual evidence. Respect direction exactly. Prefer high precision. Do not infer temporal order from narrative order alone unless the text supports it.
event_modeling_preference: Events are first-class nodes. Entities can be participants, locations or temporal anchors, but final benchmark relations should follow the dataset relation schema.

relation_examples.text: After the explosion, authorities evacuated the area.
relation_examples.explanation: The marker 'After' supports explosion before evacuation.
The marker 'causing' supports a causal event relation.

negative_examples.text: Two events are mentioned in the same sentence.
negative_examples.explanation: Same-sentence mention does not by itself imply temporal or causal relation.
